revision.text:

Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

revision.text:
QuickStatements for backfilling English labels on Wikidata items that have a corresponding page on [https://shinto.miraheze.org shinto.miraheze.org] but no en label set yet. Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

revision.text:
QuickStatements for backfilling English labels on Wikidata items that have a corresponding page on [https://shinto.miraheze.org shinto.miraheze.org] but no en label set yet. Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

revision.text:
QuickStatements for backfilling English labels on Wikidata items that have a corresponding page on [https://shinto.miraheze.org shinto.miraheze.org] but no en label set yet. Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

revision.text:
QuickStatements for backfilling English labels on Wikidata items that have a corresponding page on [https://shinto.miraheze.org shinto.miraheze.org] but no en label set yet. Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

revision.text:
QuickStatements for backfilling English labels on Wikidata items that have a corresponding page on [https://shinto.miraheze.org shinto.miraheze.org] but no en label set yet. Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

revision.text:
QuickStatements for backfilling English labels on Wikidata items that have a corresponding page on [https://shinto.miraheze.org shinto.miraheze.org] but no en label set yet. Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].

Each line below sets the English label of a Wikidata item to the local page title (with the namespace prefix stripped). Lines are automatically added and removed by [[User:EmmaBot]].
